_comment: SPL 3.0 Cookbook Catalog (spl-go) — mirrors cookbook_catalog.json but uses 'spl-go' binary. SPL 3.0 text workflow features (CALL, CALL PARALLEL, IMPORT) are already implemented in spl-go. Recipes requiring Python run.py or the multimodal codec pipeline (IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO execution) are disabled.

_schema.is_active: bool   — included in default batch run (python cookbook/run_all.py --catalog-file cookbook/cookbook_catalog-go.json)
_schema.approval_status: string — new | approved | wip | disabled | rejected

recipes.name: Self-Refine
recipes.description: CALL sub-workflow dispatch — iterative draft/critique/refine loop (TEXT → TEXT)
args: task=Write a haiku about the joy of coding

recipes.name: Code Pipeline
recipes.description: CALL sub-workflow chain — NDD closure: generate → review → improve → test → document → spec_judge (TEXT → TEXT)
args: spec=Write a binary search function that returns the index or -1

recipes.name: Image Caption
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Audio Summary
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Video Summary
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Text to Image
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go
args: prompt=A serene mountain lake at golden hour, photorealistic

recipes.name: Text to Speech
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Text to Video
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go
args: prompt=A duck walking through a quiet forest at dawn

recipes.name: Image Format Conversion
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py + Pillow codec — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Image Restyle
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go
args: style=watercolor painting, soft edges, pastel tones

recipes.name: Audio Format Conversion
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py + pydub codec — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Voice Dialogue
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py physical runner — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Video to Audio
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py + ffmpeg codec — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Video to Image
recipes.description: Requires Python run.py + ffmpeg codec — not portable to spl-go

recipes.name: Parallel Code Review
recipes.description: CALL PARALLEL — style, security, test reviews run concurrently; merged into one report (TEXT → TEXT)
args: code=def add(a, b): return a - b

recipes.name: Parallel News Digest
recipes.description: CALL PARALLEL — three news topics summarised concurrently; merged into a morning briefing (TEXT → TEXT)
